title: keyword
text: keyword Adds double quotes around field and table names and sets the Sybase option quoted_identifier on. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = keyword Description Specify the keyword option if you need to: Use Sybase reserved words in field and table names. This is required if the sql ProcScript statement is used with double quotes in queries. Use Unicode characters in SQL Workbench, the sql ProcScript statement, and error messages. In this case, the unicode option must be specified as well. With keyword is specified, strings between single quotes ( '12345' ) are treated as data, and strings between double quotes ( "StreetNameColumn" ) are treated as column names. For details on the use of the quoted_identifier setting, consult the Sybase documentation. Example: Enabling Unicode Support usys$syb_params charset utf8, unicode, smp, keyword Copy Related Links unicode Enable or disable Unicode support in the SYB connector. Was this topic helpful?
